summary: All 9 renderChainDiagram unit tests pass. Typecheck clean. Feature fully implemented: TUI diagram command, DiagramModal, CLI subcommand, i18n keys.
prMarkdown:
## Chain Diagram: ASCII Art

**Status:** Passed

- 9/9 unit tests pass (`renderChainDiagram.test.ts`)
- TypeScript typecheck clean
- TUI: diagram command in command palette (conditional on loop.taskId), scrollable DiagramModal with copy support
- CLI: `loop-task diagram <loop-id>` subcommand with proper error handling
- Cyclic chains: (cycle) notation, no infinite loops
- Missing tasks: (missing task) annotation
- Silent chains: [s] marker
- i18n keys for all UI strings
